name: Saviynt — identities / accounts import
description: Imports identities and accounts from Saviynt Enterprise Identity Cloud (EIC) — the cloud-native IGA + PAM platform — into XORCISM.IDENTITY (idempotent by Provider+ExternalID). Users → human identities; service/privileged accounts → non-human identities (NHI). Feeds the identity inventory (/identities), certification (/identity-governance) and the Saviynt-style Access Governance cockpit (/access-governance: entitlements, SoD, access requests, JIT). Config (worker environment): SAVIYNT_BASE_URL, SAVIYNT_USERNAME, SAVIYNT_PASSWORD (read-only). Offline: pass `file` = a Saviynt user/account export JSON, or run with no config to import the bundled sample. Read-only — never writes back to Saviynt.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum number of identities to import

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved Saviynt user/account export JSON to parse instead of the live API
